title: Easy-Grasp Oball
description: A flexible, lightweight ball with 32 finger holes, perfect for tiny hands to grip, roll, and throw. Its soft construction and easy-care material make it ideal for early playtime.
why_pip_picked_this: Excellent design for early grasping with numerous finger holes, promoting fine motor skills and sensory development. High rating and review count indicate strong retail proof.

title: Multi-sensory Teether
description: An award-winning teether and rattle with a mesmerizing maze of soft, continuous, BPA-free loops that are easy for tiny hands to grasp, hold, and chew. Can be refrigerated for added soothing.
why_pip_picked_this: Unique design with bendable loops makes it exceptionally easy for infants to grasp and manipulate, supporting fine motor skills and providing teething relief.
founder_lens: Price is based on US site, approximate UK price from search. Need to verify exact UK price and retailer.

best_for: Sensory stimulation and fine motor skills
title: Freddie the Firefly
description: A friendly firefly with a soft velour body, bright colors, patterns, and textures. Features a peek-a-boo mirror, squeaker, clinking rings, and a tethered ladybug teether. Easily clips to strollers and carriers.
why_pip_picked_this: Multi-sensory features (crinkle, squeaker, teether, mirror, varied textures) engage multiple senses and encourage reaching, grasping, and tactile exploration. Clip-on design adds versatility.
founder_lens: Rating and review count not found on John Lewis page. Need to confirm if available elsewhere.
safety_notes: Remove all packaging and tags before giving to a child

title: Newborn Activity Kit
description: A 12-piece kit designed to meet newborns' developmental needs, encouraging sensory exploration and tummy time. Includes flash cards, a baby-safe mirror, tummy time pillow, rattle ring, crinkling lion cub, and a soft lion blankie.
why_pip_picked_this: Offers a comprehensive set of developmental toys for newborns, covering visual, auditory, and tactile stimulation, as well as supporting tummy time and early grasping.
founder_lens: Review count is low (5 reviews). Need to check if more reviews are available on other retailers.

best_for: Tactile exploration and motor skill development
title: Soft Grasping Ball
description: A beautifully soft grasping ball with varied textures and subtle colors, designed to support sensory exploration and motor skills from birth. Easy for little hands to grab, roll, and explore.
why_pip_picked_this: Soft fabric and varied textures provide gentle tactile stimulation, while its design encourages grasping, rolling, and motor skill development.
